subject: Office Depot - Order Confirmation
body:
Thank you for your purchase at Office Depot!

Order Confirmation #OD-2026-98765

Items ordered:
  Whiteboard markers (12-pack)    $15.30
  Sticky notes (bulk)             $22.00

Total: $89.30

Your order will be delivered to your office address on file.

Thank you for choosing Office Depot!
